intro: Hieracium eustomon, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wound healing, fever reduction, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium eustomon include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Hieracium eustomon is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion to treat various ailments, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and supplements.
